safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that draft complainant material is served but ABE interview video, transcript, and final signed MG11 remain outstanding.
safePositionToday: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that draft complainant material is served but ABE interview video, transcript, and final signed MG11 remain outstanding.
askCourtToRecord: Outstanding disclosure: ABE interview video; ABE interview transcript; Final signed MG11; Third-party counselling notes.
Invite the court to order disclosure by a fixed date with a review hearing.
disclosureTimetable: The defence invites the court to order disclosure of ABE interview video; ABE interview transcript; Final signed MG11; Third-party counselling notes by [date] with a review on [date]. Position remains provisional.
doNotOverstate: Do not rely on ABE or complainant account as final proof without served interview material.
Do not summarise ABE as fact unless the served record is reviewed.
